objects.name: crown_shard
objects.description: A broken fragment of an old kingdom's crown coin, still accepted as currency among the allied ruins.

objects.name: gate_blank
objects.description: A rough iron blank cut to the shape of a siege-gate key, awaiting precise filing.

objects.name: siege_key
objects.description: A heavy key forged to open the great locks of ruined fortifications.

objects.name: charcoal_stylus
objects.description: A stylus made from compressed charcoal and a wooden grip, used for field reports.

objects.name: war_parchment
objects.description: A coarse parchment used by scouts and commanders to record war machine sightings.

objects.name: scout_satchel
objects.description: A worn leather satchel issued to every hunter of devil-forged machines.

objects.name: charred_timber
objects.description: A blackened timber salvaged from a burned kingdom, still sturdy enough for crafting.

objects.name: iron_bar
objects.description: A smelted bar of iron pulled from the ruins, ready for forging into weapons against devil machines.

objects.name: war_bench
objects.description: A reinforced workbench built by allied smiths for field assembly of anti-machine weapons.

objects.name: crucible
objects.description: A stone crucible heated by hellcoal embers, hot enough to smelt war-grade metals.

objects.name: rubble
objects.description: Chunks of broken stone from a kingdom's collapsed walls, useful for construction.

objects.name: salvage_cloth
objects.description: Tattered fabric pulled from ruined banners and bedrolls, still serviceable.

objects.name: charite
objects.description: Black mineral powder from scorched earth, used for writing and simple firestarters.

objects.name: scrap_iron
objects.description: Bent iron fragments torn from a destroyed war machine's hull.

objects.name: devil_oil
objects.description: A dark, viscous lubricant drained from a fallen war machine's joints. Burns with infernal heat.

objects.name: hellcoal
objects.description: A smoldering lump of infernal fuel that never fully cools, salvaged from machine furnaces.

objects.name: cog
objects.description: A precision-cut gear from a war machine's drive assembly, still perfectly meshed.

objects.name: fiend_plate
objects.description: A thick armor plate ripped from a devil machine's chassis, etched with hellish runes.

objects.name: demon_core_shard
objects.description: A pulsing fragment from a war machine's heart, radiating malevolent energy.

objects.name: brimite_ore
objects.description: A sulfurous ore found near devil forges, glowing faintly with trapped hellfire.

objects.name: sinew_cord
objects.description: Twisted cord braided from salvaged fibers and dried sinew, surprisingly tough.

objects.name: scorched_plank
objects.description: A plank cut from charred timber, still solid beneath the blackened surface.

objects.name: wood_strip
objects.description: A thin strip of wood shaped for hafts, pegs, and reinforcements.

objects.name: wooden_rod
objects.description: A straight rod of hardened wood, useful as a weapon haft or striking tool.

objects.name: timber_plate
objects.description: A broad wooden plate cut for crude shielding and barricades.

objects.name: wood_rivet
objects.description: A small wooden peg for fastening plates together in field-built armor.

objects.name: bandage_roll
objects.description: A rolled bolt of salvage cloth prepared for binding wounds or crafting gear.

objects.name: stitched_panel
objects.description: A reinforced cloth panel stitched for field armor assembly.

objects.name: padded_lining
objects.description: Layered padding that absorbs the crushing blows of war machines.

objects.name: war_strap
objects.description: A tough strap for securing armor plates and weapon grips.

objects.name: rubble_chunk
objects.description: A roughly split chunk of masonry, the bones of a dead kingdom.

objects.name: ruin_slab
objects.description: A flat slab of old kingdom stone, chipped smooth for crafting.

objects.name: knapped_edge
objects.description: A sharp stone edge flaked from ruin slabs, crude but effective.

objects.name: ruin_blade
objects.description: A finished stone blade shaped from kingdom ruins, ready for mounting.

objects.name: ruin_plate
objects.description: A heavy stone plate drilled and smoothed, strapped for protective use.

objects.name: iron_nugget
objects.description: A small smelted lump of iron recovered from scrap, a step toward war-grade metal.

objects.name: iron_sheet
objects.description: A hammered iron sheet for cutting into armor segments.

objects.name: iron_scale
objects.description: A single iron scale punched from sheet metal, designed to overlap with others.

objects.name: scale_bundle
objects.description: A bundled set of iron scales sorted and tied for assembly into armor.

objects.name: forged_blade_blank
objects.description: A rough-forged blade blank awaiting an edge, made from kingdom iron.

objects.name: honed_blade
objects.description: A sharpened iron blade with a keen edge, forged specifically to pierce machine armor.

objects.name: fiend_strip
objects.description: A narrow strip cut from fiend plate, resilient and unnaturally light.

objects.name: fiend_rivet
objects.description: A small rivet punched from fiend plate, impossibly strong for its size.

objects.name: brimite_nugget
objects.description: A dense nugget smelted from brimite ore, hot to the touch and faintly glowing.

objects.name: brimite_ingot
objects.description: A refined brimite ingot that pulses with trapped hellfire, forged for the strongest gear.

objects.name: brimite_blade_blank
objects.description: A forged blank of brimite alloy that glows along hairline fractures.

objects.name: brimite_blade
objects.description: A finished brimite blade that seethes with infernal heat along its edge.

objects.name: hellcoal_concentrate
objects.description: Compressed hellcoal reduced to a volatile paste, used to temper devil-forged alloys.

objects.name: fiend_alloy
objects.description: A brimite alloy quenched in hellcoal, shimmering with dark fire.

objects.name: fiend_alloy_sheet
objects.description: A hammered sheet of fiend alloy, nearly impervious and radiating dark heat.

objects.name: fiend_alloy_scale
objects.description: A single scale of fiend alloy, warm to the touch and nearly indestructible.

objects.name: fiend_scale_bundle
objects.description: A bundled set of fiend alloy scales, enough to armor a machine hunter.

objects.name: war_engine_heart
objects.description: The intact heart of a devil-forged war engine, thrumming with infernal power. A trophy and key component.

objects.name: oil_flask
objects.description: A sealed flask of concentrated devil oil, useful for tempering blades and igniting traps.

objects.name: cog_assembly
objects.description: A linked assembly of war machine cogs, repurposed for crafting mechanical devices.

objects.name: gearwork_frame
objects.description: A mechanical frame assembled from cogs and iron, the skeleton of a machine hunter's tool.

objects.name: charcoal_brick
objects.description: A compressed block of charite, burns slow and hot for field smelting.

objects.name: ruin_club
objects.description: A heavy chunk of timber shaped into a crude club. Better than bare fists.

objects.name: spiked_club
objects.description: A wooden club studded with rubble shards, effective against lesser automatons.

objects.name: timber_sword
objects.description: A hardened wooden sword, standard issue for newly recruited machine hunters.

objects.name: ruin_maul
objects.description: A heavy stone head mounted on a wooden haft, built to crack machine plating.

objects.name: ruin_spear
objects.description: A stone-tipped spear for keeping war machines at arm's length.

objects.name: iron_mace
objects.description: A flanged iron mace designed to dent and buckle war machine armor.

objects.name: hunter_sword
objects.description: A sharp iron sword honed for slicing through war machine tendons and cables.

objects.name: gearwork_lance
objects.description: A mechanical lance driven by cog assemblies that punch through the thickest plating.

objects.name: brimite_sword
objects.description: A brimite-edged sword that sears through devil-forged metal as if it were parchment.

objects.name: demonslayer
objects.description: A legendary blade forged from fiend alloy and quenched in a war engine's dying heart. The bane of all devil machines.

objects.name: oil_bomb
objects.description: A clay pot filled with devil oil and charcoal, thrown to ignite war machines.

objects.name: hellfire_bomb
objects.description: A volatile bomb packed with hellcoal concentrate that erupts in searing infernal fire.

objects.name: cog_crossbow
objects.description: A crossbow with a cog-driven winch that fires iron bolts with devastating force.

objects.name: fiend_halberd
objects.description: A massive polearm tipped with fiend alloy, made to cleave war machines in two.

objects.name: scrap_buckler
objects.description: A small shield hammered together from scrap iron. Barely holds, but it's something.

objects.name: padded_tunic
objects.description: A padded tunic that absorbs the shock of machine strikes.

objects.name: timber_vest
objects.description: Overlapping timber plates strapped to a padded lining, crude but effective.

objects.name: ruin_cuirass
objects.description: Heavy stone plates from fallen walls, strapped into a crude but formidable cuirass.

objects.name: hunter_scale
objects.description: Layered iron scales riveted to a padded frame, the standard armor of machine hunters.

objects.name: fiend_cuirass
objects.description: Armor assembled from war machine plating, turning a devil's own armor against its kind.

objects.name: demonhide_armor
objects.description: The ultimate armor forged from fiend alloy scales and a war engine's heart, nearly impervious to all attack.

objects.name: scrap_helm
objects.description: A dented helmet cobbled from scrap iron and leather straps.

objects.name: hunter_helm
objects.description: A proper iron helmet with cheek guards, standard for machine hunters entering combat zones.

objects.name: fiend_helm
objects.description: A helm forged from fiend alloy, its visor shaped like a snarling devil's face.

objects.name: timber_shield
objects.description: A broad wooden shield reinforced with rivets, good for blocking machine strikes.

objects.name: hunter_shield
objects.description: An iron-faced shield built to deflect the crushing blows of war machines.

objects.name: fiend_shield
objects.description: A tower shield faced with fiend alloy that can stop even a charging war engine.

objects.name: ruin_gauntlets
objects.description: Heavy gauntlets armored with stone plates, for punching through machine casings.

objects.name: hunter_gauntlets
objects.description: Articulated iron gauntlets that protect the hands without sacrificing grip.

objects.name: fiend_gauntlets
objects.description: Gauntlets of fiend alloy that grip with supernatural strength and shrug off infernal heat.

objects.name: war_pack
objects.description: A reinforced pack built for machine hunters carrying salvage from the field.

objects.name: siege_crate
objects.description: A heavy iron-banded crate used for transporting machine parts and war supplies.

objects.name: field_journal
objects.description: A bound journal for recording war machine sightings, weak points, and battle strategies.

objects.name: scrap_lantern
objects.description: A crude lantern fueled by devil oil, casting flickering light in dark machine lairs.

objects.name: repair_kit
objects.description: A toolkit of scrap iron, cord, and oil for field repairs on armor and weapons.

objects.name: chain_net
objects.description: A weighted net of iron chain used to entangle smaller war machines. Also an ingredient for traps.

objects.name: machine_trap
objects.description: A spring-loaded trap of iron and cogs designed to cripple war machine legs.

objects.name: warding_charm
objects.description: A charm woven from sinew and demon core shards that deflects infernal energy.

objects.name: war_codex
objects.description: A thick codex cataloguing every known devil-forged war machine, with blank pages for new entries.

npcs.name: kael_ashworth
npcs.description: A grizzled quartermaster of the united kingdoms, selling supplies to machine hunters from his battered wagon.

npcs.name: vessa_ironhand
npcs.description: A master smith from a fallen kingdom who specializes in forging weapons from salvaged war machine parts.

npcs.name: old_marshal
npcs.description: A scarred veteran of the first machine wars who guides new hunters and knows where the devil engines prowl.

npcs.name: scrap_automaton
npcs.description: A small devil-forged automaton cobbled from scrap metal, jerking forward on broken legs with murderous intent.

npcs.name: iron_ravager
npcs.description: A hulking war machine on four iron legs, its saw-blade arms still spinning with hellfire fury.

npcs.name: infernal_colossus
npcs.description: A towering devil-forged siege engine wreathed in brimstone smoke, the deadliest machine the allied kingdoms have ever faced.

npcs.name: ember_scavenger
npcs.description: A swift, spider-like automaton that scuttles through wreckage, scavenging parts and attacking anyone who disturbs its hoard.
